rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using assume/guarantee for component type contracts and assign for implementation-level output bindings.
Only reference visible features or declared variables in contracts; avoid subcomponent paths in type scopes.
generic_rules: Use type scope for input/output behavioral constraints and implementation scope for binding assignments.
Guarantees should express visible output dependencies on visible inputs, not internal implementation details.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Wrap AGREE content in annex agree {** ... **};
Use assign only for output features or auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions.
Do not place guarantee clauses in implementation scope.
